title: Add capitalize-simple utility function
description: Add a string capitalize utility function in src/utils/capitalize-simple.ts. This simple task should fall back to normal pipeline since complexity_score < 4. The function should capitalize only the first letter of a string (similar to the existing capitalize in cap.ts but with simpler logic). Test file should follow existing pattern with .test.ts suffix co-located.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility file exporting a capitalize function with basic string handling - empty string guard and first character uppercasing
Capitalize utility following co-located test file pattern with .test.ts suffix
Test file pattern using vitest with describe/it/expect, testing empty string, single char, and basic cases
